title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
